description: batch-probe demo: per-pod GPU right-sizing + achieved utilization for an AI burst workload (the 'effective use' half of the pipeline thesis).
gpu: NVIDIA GV100 32GB (Atlas GPU 1, isolated via CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1)

search.note: high capped at 256 for safety; returned batch ~= high*(1-headroom), bounded by the safety cap, NOT the device memory limit (only 2.4 GB used at batch 204)

finding: batch-probe selects a fitting batch and the burst saturates the device: 94.4% mean / 100% peak GPU utilization at a safe 61 C -- far above NRP's >40% sustained-util expectation. This demonstrates the 'effective use' claim; the absolute max-batch number is bounded by the safety-capped search range, not the GPU.
